chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 4417 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.6972/2020 (Fast Track) 3. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Therefore, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
